final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original post-apocalyptic scene illustration featuring an armored vehicle in a desolate desert (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "末日废土" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Mad Max: Fury Road production design (2010s Australian post-apoc visual language), 1980s Heavy Metal magazine sci-fi illustration tradition, Fallout game concept art (2000s–2010s American wasteland design); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a wide cinematic framing with the armored vehicle as mid-ground focal point and ruined cityscape receding into the distant background — exact framing tightness is yours
Subject: must include a heavily modified armored vehicle (one) in the foreground-to-mid zone, and collapsed urban ruins in the far background
Scene/backdrop: must include a desolate desert landscape with drifting sand and dust; collapsed city ruins visible in the distance
Lighting/mood: needs a tense, survival-pressure atmosphere with a hazy yellow-brown sky and windswept sand — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dusty yellow-brown and ash-grey dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a weathered, corroded, grit-heavy surface treatment on the vehicle and ruins — exact rust level and grain is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: must avoid clean, pristine, or utopian visual cues; must avoid blue sky or lush greenery
